input.placeholder: Enter todo or paste a link…

empty.inbox: Inbox is empty. Add a task or bookmark.
empty.week: No tasks planned for this week
empty.today: Nothing for today. Move from This Week

header.guideHelp: Product intro and how-to for new users
header.shareHelp: Deploy online or copy the public link for other devices
header.searchHelp: Find tasks by title, link, notes or tag. Shortcut ⌘K
header.archiveHelp: View completed tasks; restore or delete permanently
header.settingsHelp: API URL, bookmarklet, and language preferences

tags.label: Tags
tags.noneSelected: No tags selected — pick above or create one

deploy.descFree: Deploy to Vercel (free) for a 24/7 fixed HTTPS link — share anytime, no PC required.
deploy.descOnline: Link stays valid — works for anyone, anywhere.
deploy.descVercel: Your app is on Vercel with a fixed URL.
deploy.vercelDesc: One-time deploy — link like https://xxx.vercel.app/zh stays forever, 24/7.
deploy.tunnelDesc: URL changes and dies when your PC stops — for quick demos only.
deploy.dockerDesc: Production-like local setup; still needs a tunnel to share.
deploy.freeStep3: Copy the real loca.lt URL + /zh and share
deploy.freeNote: For a fixed link anytime, use Vercel above (~15 min, $0).
deploy.tunnelTip: loca.lt links expire when the tunnel stops. First visit may need Continue.
deploy.onlineTip: Set Bookmarklet API URL to this domain in Settings.

deployGuide.title: Permanent link deploy guide
deployGuide.recommendedDesc: One deploy → fixed HTTPS URL (xxx.vercel.app), 24/7, share with anyone.
deployGuide.noSignup: Needs free GitHub, Turso, and Vercel accounts
deployGuide.keepPcOn: No need to keep your PC on after deploy
deployGuide.step2: Create Turso DB, copy URL and Token
deployGuide.step3: Import repo in Vercel, set TURSO_DATABASE_URL and TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN
deployGuide.laterDesc: npm run dev + npm run share gives a loca.lt link that dies when your PC stops.

guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle: Learn how to use Task & Link Manager
guide.welcome: Welcome! A lightweight task and link manager. Capture ideas in Inbox, plan the week, focus on Today.
guide.flowIntro: Tasks flow in one direction from idea to done:
guide.flowInboxDesc: Inbox: capture todos, links and bookmarks — Work / Life
guide.flowWeekDesc: This Week: plan what to finish this week, with progress bar
guide.flowTodayDesc: Today: what you actually do today, grouped by P0 / P1 / P2
guide.qs1Desc: Type in the top bar or paste a link (Bilibili, WeChat, YouTube, etc.) — title auto-fills
guide.qs2Desc: Inbox → Week (↑↑), Week → Today (↑★), or drag between columns
guide.qs3Desc: Click task text to mark done (strikethrough + grey), or use ✓ Done on Today items
guide.qs4Desc: Click + in a column header to add directly to that column
guide.linkDesc: Paste a URL to fetch the title. Two modes:
guide.link1: Task: can move to Week and Today
guide.link3: If fetch fails, edit the title manually — URL is still saved
guide.actEditWhere: Any item — title, notes, tags, priority
guide.actDragWhere: Drag items between columns (bookmarks stay in Inbox)
guide.extra1: More options: task/bookmark, work/life, notes and tags
guide.extra2: Create and delete custom tags; pick presets with one click
guide.extra3: Search (top bar) finds title, link, notes, tags — ⌘K
guide.extra4: Archive shows completed items; restore or delete
guide.tip1: On mobile, columns switch to tabs automatically
guide.tip2: Keep Today to 3–7 items to stay focused
guide.tip3: Questions? Ask whoever shared this with you

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiBaseHint: Server URL used by the bookmarklet
